debug_info.goal:
G : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Group G
K : ℝ
inst✝ : DecidableEq G
A : Finset G
hA₀ : A.Nonempty
hA : ↑(A ^ 2).card ≤ K * ↑A.card
hK : 1 ≤ K
S : Finset G := ⋯
hS₁ : 1 ∈ S
hS₀ : S.Nonempty
hSA : S ⊆ A⁻¹ * A
hSsymm : S⁻¹ = S
⊢ ↑(A⁻¹ * A).card ≤ K ^ 2 * ↑A.card

proof:
by
      refine le_of_mul_le_mul_left (a := (#A : ℝ)) ?_ (by positivity)
      calc
        (#A : ℝ) * #(A⁻¹ * A) ≤ (#(A * A) : ℝ) * #(A * A) := by
          exact_mod_cast ruzsa_triangle_inequality_invMul_mul_mul A A A
        _ ≤ (K * #A) * (K * #A) := by
          rw [pow_two] at hA
          exact mul_le_mul hA hA (by positivity) (by positivity)
        _ = #A * (K ^ 2 * #A) := by ring
successful_attempts:
by
      refine le_of_mul_le_mul_left (a := (#A : ℝ)) ?_ (by positivity)
      calc
        (#A : ℝ) * #(A⁻¹ * A) ≤ (#(A * A) : ℝ) * #(A * A) := by
          exact_mod_cast ruzsa_triangle_inequality_invMul_mul_mul A A A
        _ ≤ (K * #A) * (K * #A) := by
          rw [pow_two] at hA
          exact mul_le_mul hA hA (by positivity) (by positivity)
        _ = #A * (K ^ 2 * #A) := by ring
